scripts.predev: STUART_SKIP_VM_HELPER=1 node ../../scripts/ensure-vm-helper.mjs && node ../../scripts/cleanup-dev-ports.mjs && pnpm --filter @stuart/shared build && pnpm --filter @stuart/db build && pnpm --filter @stuart/sandbox-executor build && pnpm --filter @stuart/runtime-supervisor build && pnpm --filter @stuart/harness build
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "pnpm run dev:server" "pnpm run dev:client"
scripts.prebuild: pnpm --filter @stuart/shared build && pnpm --filter @stuart/db build && pnpm --filter @stuart/sandbox-executor build && pnpm --filter @stuart/runtime-supervisor build && pnpm --filter @stuart/harness build
scripts.pretypecheck: pnpm --filter @stuart/shared build && pnpm --filter @stuart/db build && pnpm --filter @stuart/sandbox-executor build && pnpm --filter @stuart/runtime-supervisor build && pnpm --filter @stuart/harness build
